conditions.text: Tester (before Test gate): black-box e2e in crates/mpd/tests/e2e.rs — tracked symlink makes non-staged 'mpd check' exit non-zero with the fail-closed diagnostic, no clean-scan success line. Compile-enforcement + wrapper test does not prove callers block.

reconciliations.reason: Review attempts were consumed by freshness rewinds triggered by authoring the plan artifacts themselves: amending design.md to close Security(plan) Condition 1 (name all three enumeration-boundary residuals + fix the spec overclaim) and removing a leftover template comment from tasks.md. No review FAILs occurred; the plan is final and Security(plan) returned CONDITIONAL PASS with Condition 1 closed and Condition 2 (Tester e2e) open as an archive-blocker. Continuing to advance to Build.

Attempts consumed by freshness rewinds from a manifest scope-declaration fix, not review failures: the initial manifest.json omitted openspec/changes/scan-secrets-fail-closed/** and the ledger path that every archived change declares, so the candidate never retained the change dir and archive failed. Manifest corrected; artifacts and code final. All gate verdicts already earned (Security plan+code conditions satisfied; Test PASS with the e2e archive-blocker present).
